items.briefing:
Ransomware threats are escalating, with AI now helping attackers move faster than ever — meaning organisations have less time to respond before damage is done. A new report highlights that recovery planning is becoming just as critical as prevention. Separately, hackers are actively exploiting unpatched vulnerabilities in SonicWall remote access devices, and a broader study found 79% of organisations have been hit by incidents involving known, fixable vulnerabilities — a reminder that keeping software up to date remains essential.

**Practical tip:** Check with your IT team that any remote access or VPN devices your organisation uses are fully patched and up to date.

featured.title: DigiCert survey finds 81% of Australian organisations hit by AI security incidents or vulnerabilities
featured.quote: AI security incidents already affecting majority of Australian organisations, requiring urgent response strategies.
